{{Infobox artifact
| name = Suriel's token
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel's token]] is a glass bead with a blue candle-flame trapped inside.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel's token]] cannot be broken or lost because it is tied to the user with strings of [[fate]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] can sense the token across worlds and beyond time.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
